description: Create a GitHub Actions workflow named Publish to PyPi @ Release that triggers on published releases. The workflow should have two jobs: one to build the distribution on ubuntu-latest with Python 3.x, and another to upload it to PyPI. The build job should check out the code, install build, build the source and wheels, and store the distribution packages as an artifact. The upload job should download the artifact, and use a GitHub Action to publish the distribution to PyPI.
